channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged and hazardous Council pedestrian guard railing fronting Shortlands Station., 18th July
item.description:
Seemingly impact-damaged Visirail pedestrian guard railing panel in Shortlands Rd at the traffic signal jct with Bromley Rd fronting Shortlands Station. Two of the rails are now spike hazards into where pedestrians walk at this busy location. Please attend to this as a matter of urgency. Seen 10.45am Saturday 18/7/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of plant waste now housing rats. On the outside of car park behind shops, near bins and drying area, 18th July
item.description:
Piles of plant waste now housing rats. Been here at least 6 months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Masons Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and damaged fencing, 18th July
item.description:
Fjere is a small amount of fly tipping and also damage to the fencing along the alleyway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellan Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction to footpath, 18th July
item.description:
Permanent obstruction to footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burrell Row, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped toilet and liquid container at parking spaces on Kempe road and masons road, 18th July
item.description:
Flytipped toilet and liquid container (been here months) at parking spaces on Kempe road and masons road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Masons Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 18th July
item.description:
The bin just outside the gate into Danson Park, opposite Danson Crescent, is overflowing and some rubbish has been left next to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burst pipe middle of main road Chelsea Embankment, 18th July
item.description:
There is water coming out from the middle of the main road right in front of Chelsea Quay. It has created flooding which is growing. I noticed it on Friday and today Saturday the flood had extended. I have also reported on Thames Water website (have not heard back) but putting it in here just in case.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chelsea Embankment, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights broken - not safe, 18th July
item.description:
Weeks after reporting these footpath lights not working they are still not working causing danger to potential trip and full hazards and also personal safety as it is pitch black.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp dumped in front garden, 18th July
item.description:
Lamp dumped / hidden in front of 4 Highshore Road - moved onto street for collection
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Highshore Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked storm water drain, 18th July
item.description:
Blocked storm water drain that is backing up and smelling very bad
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 350, Caledonian Road, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 25, 18th July
item.description:
Street light not working making street very dark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Dartmouth Park Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th July
item.description:
Fly tipping is getting worse and needs to be addressed asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left outside my garden door, 18th July
item.description:
Its been 3 days rubbish has been left outside my garden door a neighbour has had a big clear out from there garden and has dumped everything infront of my garden door its a hazard to get out my door and im sceard they will set it on fire lots of residents
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broke Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters on pavement, 18th July
item.description:
Empty gas canisters on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sansom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins filled with construction black bags, 18th July
item.description:
Less than 24 hours, someone filled all of the rubbish and recycling bins with black bag garbage from a builder site.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Quilp Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing with poo bags on the floor, 18th July
item.description:
This bin outside the primary school is constantly overflowing with poo bags all over the floor. This photo was taken today

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorndon Avenue, West Horndon, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light shining directly into bedroom, 18th July
item.description:
Severe light pollution from column 8 outside Dalston Lane Terrace. It shines right into our bedroom and disrupts sleep. Please fit a street light baffle to block the spill.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fenton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars go around the corner too quickly, 18th July
item.description:
Especially at night — I am a cyclist — car pull out at this corner at top speed without slowing and cut lanes. There should be a give way or stop sign or even better, zebra crossing to incentivise drivers to slow down. Third time I pull myself out of a speeding driver cutting my lane while turning right from Yelverton to Hollman.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holman Road, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 18th July
item.description:
There is an untaxed abandoned silver van parked opposite number 1 Cloudesley Road, Bexleyheath, DA7 5EP. The number plate is RA54 EOF, which is not recognised on the DVLA database and appears to have been altered. The O looks to have been altered, possibly with black tape. The vehicle hasn't moved for at least 6 months and does not appear road worthy. Please can it be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cloudesley Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ALL lights!, 18th July
item.description:
No lights here are coded. Most don’t work and all need upgrading to LED. All need inspecting. Some trees also need cutting Access road and car park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
